what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a single design-asset image named Icon_Gold_Furniture in the design-assets channel, tracking its address, blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, versioning, authorship, alt text, and links.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content
It describes an image/png asset with a blob:// URI
Width and height are both recorded as 0
There is one version (v1) with an empty alt field
created and updated timestamps are identical
standards: Zero width/height for an image asset is unusual
Empty alt text on a visual icon
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter inside a .md file for structured asset metadata
Uses an image:// channel address and a blob:// storage reference
Maintains a versions array with per-version blob, MIME, dimensions, author, alt, and timestamps
concerns: Width and height of 0 suggest missing or unprocessed image metadata
Empty alt text may limit accessibility or searchability
No links leave the asset disconnected from consumers or contexts
Source 'dragnet' is unexplained in this file
notes: A metadata stub for a gold-furniture icon PNG in the design-assets channel, with unset dimensions, no alt text, and no outgoing links.
questions: What does source 'dragnet' indicate about provenance?
What alt text or description should this icon carry?
Where is the actual blob stored and how is it served?
Which UI or design contexts consume this icon?
purpose_vs_actual: The file's purpose is to catalog and version a reusable icon asset; actually it only stores basic identity and storage metadata, with missing image dimensions and descriptive content.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a reusable gold furniture icon in a shared design-assets repository so it can be located by address/blob, versioned, and referenced by other systems.
contribution: Provides a persistent, addressable metadata record for a named image asset, including its blob reference, MIME type, authorship, and version history, which a fused system can use to locate and version the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for the Icon_Gold_Furniture PNG asset in the design-assets channel, recording its blob reference, MIME type, zero dimensions, authorship, version, and empty alt text and links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and version a reusable gold furniture icon image for design or UI consumption.
